productDisplayName: Force 10 Men Black & Grey Sports Shoes
description: Style NoteThis force 10 shoe is a comfortable lifestyle shoe performs well when you're at the gym, taking a brisk walk or jogging in the morning. It's a great foot style option for the health conscious and the comfort junkies!Product DetailsBlunt toed casual shoe in grey and neon green with central lace-ups and a slightly upraised heelSynthetic upper with mesh inlays and felt overlaysPadded collar and tongue with a mesh innerFoamy rubber midsoleOutsole adhered to the midsoleMaterial and CareSyntheticDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
